mapper.select: SELECT si.inventory_id, si.store_id, si.product_id, si.current_stock_qty, si.safety_stock_qty, si.auto_order_qty, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.name AS product_name, p.unit, p.unit_cost, a.file_path AS image_url FROM store_inventory si JOIN products p ON p.product_id = si.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parent_id, MAX(file_path) AS file_path FROM attachments WHERE category = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY parent_id ) a ON a.parent_id = p.product_id WHERE si.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY c.name ASC, p.name ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM store_inventory WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND COALESCE(current_stock_qty, 0) <= COALESCE(safety_stock_qty, 0)

SELECT si.inventory_id, si.store_id, si.product_id, si.current_stock_qty, si.safety_stock_qty, si.auto_order_qty, p.category_id, c.name AS category_name, p.name AS product_name, p.unit, p.unit_cost, a.file_path AS image_url FROM store_inventory si JOIN products p ON p.product_id = si.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.category_id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parent_id, MAX(file_path) AS file_path FROM attachments WHERE category = 'PRODUCT' GROUP BY parent_id ) a ON a.parent_id = p.product_id WHERE si.store_id = #{storeId} AND si.product_id = #{productId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT store_id AS storeId, product_id AS productId, auto_order_qty AS autoOrderQty FROM store_inventory WHERE current_stock_qty <= safety_stock_qty
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store_inventory (store_id, product_id, current_stock_qty, safety_stock_qty, auto_order_qty) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{productId}, #{currentStockQty}, #{safetyStockQty}, #{autoOrderQty})
INSERT INTO inventory_logs (store_id, product_id, change_type, before_qty, change_qty, result_qty) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{productId}, #{changeType}, #{beforeQty}, #{changeQty}, #{resultQty})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM store_inventory WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND product_id = #{productId}
